item.title: Taking out the trash this morning.
item.description: My brother threw away his daughters Xmas present because it was black……. Why are y’all down voting me. I didn’t fucking do it. I rescued her Apologies about the title of the post. I was taking my moms trash to the can and found the doll in the trash can
item.dc:creator: BoomBoomSaloon

item.title: Interrupt your Christmas selfies for an important announcement…
item.description:
The holidays can be an extremely difficult, even scary time for those whose families are not supportive or accepting of who they are. If you are feeling alone today, I see you and I love you. I’ve got your back. Front Page edit: I never expected to make the front page on Selfie Day so I will just say I have always admired how much this community supports its LGBTQ+ siblings. Keep it up. They need you. ❤️
And now back to your regular scheduled posting. Merry Christmas you gorgeous creatures.
item.dc:creator: license2kilt

item.title: I am double dosing ( with complimentary memes )

In my true fashion, sweatpants
Red Dead Redemption 2
Someone better get casca off that train.
Phew boy, I'd really love to know what's mature about this. If it's the banana nut meme, they stupid.

item.title: Merry Christmas Everybody!
item.description: Another year in the books! I love this community and can't thank you enough for always making me feel so welcome :D Expect another year of amazing cosplays this year! Also yes... out of cosplay right now I have some Major Meg Ryan from every 90's RomCom Vibes happening :P

item.title: Noted Images: Christmas Megadump.
item.description:
PASM
HELL YE
I don't care if it's crimis, get Mari Llwyd
B O O F
angy
0u0
Satan noting how he can fuck things up next year
yes
yeeeeah
YOU TRY OPENING SHIT WITH NO HANDS
Hell yeah
Love how the left one is the only one NOT tied to the tracks
hell yeah
just one (1)
kinda would watch that, especially if it mocks magical girl tropes.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Happy mememas
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Christmas Before and After selfies
item.description: Two years of drastically reducing (mostly quitting entirely, but recently had a post-miscarriage relapse) drinking. Christmas season a few years ago vs now. No significant diet changes other than less processed foods since I have the energy to cook again. A little encouragement to give yourself the best Christmas present ever :) Have a great 25th, all!
item.dc:creator: Flamesonthesideofmyface

item.title: Merry Xmas from night shift on Med/Surg!
item.description: It's been a really busy night. Staffing issues as usual. I am quite sweaty. Hug your loved ones and enjoy the holiday!
item.dc:creator: baraseth

item.title: God jul, imgur
item.description:
When you can't find the stocking and Santa hat you want, you'll have to make it yourself!
Bought this fabric 1 - 2 years ago, finally found something to use it for! The white faux fur is actually some left over fabric from this Christmas dress I made 2021 https://imgur.com/gallery/N975d2h
Done!
Onto the next project! The hat
Cat tax! My 12 year old baby Mr Maowmers and my brothers 1 year old Ziggy. Merry Christmas everyone, hope you'll have a really festive holiday!
item.dc:creator: Miiaka

item.title: I hope everyone has a very Tolkien Christmas
item.dc:creator: ISenseTheresSomethingInTheWind

item.title: Recycling Bin Dump
item.description:
#memes #dump #recycling #tecyclingbin NOW WITH COMMENTARY!!!
Hell yeah smoke with Char! [eans over to my friend] you don’t know him but he’s my childhood hero. An ace pilot. Look at Amuro lurking in the background, looking to smoke but too timid to ask… chump
It’s possible that they carved the mammoth whole looking at it.
Practically perfect in every way.
Who knew? We just needed to blow on the cartridge.
Can I get some water to wash this down?
I finally got one out and it still had blood in it!
Ooooh… it’s what you do to meeeeee~~~
Oh it’s what you do to meeee~~~
That look of relief the possum has when nobody is paying attention to him because they’re all focused on the camera… I feel that look in my soul.
Ha. Quantum humor
Maybe a woman screaming in the background? For dramatic effect.
The elves really could use a union rep but he’s buried under 12 feet of ice.
This is the kind of girl power/solidarity I can get behind.
I agree with Dr. Jones.
Yeah, fuck that. Fuck that right in the ear.
How about now? Is now okay? How about… now? Now?
Sadly yes. We’ll never reach phase 1 at this point.
No regrets behind them eyes.
It’s that look of disgust mixed with “wtf?!?!” That makes this picture for me.
It’s a balancing act between public embarrassment/shame versus getting your back blown out.
The pornograph drones on and on…
Yeah. That’s why I’m torn about the issue of abortion. I’m for it because it kills babies but I’m against it because it gives women a choice.
Was that too dark too fast?
Glorious vibes all the way. Rock bottom ain’t walking her dog anywhere.
A rock? A rock worked okay the first time. Innat what he used?
A bread poem, boning poem(bow chika wow wow), paring poem, kitchen poem, santoku poem…
And they’re like, “this sucks” damn right, this sucks. I can teach you, but you’re not interested
You guys have batteries?
It’s a very delicate scale. Balanced on a knife’s edge
“Gentle” reminder
Come on in! The water’s fine!!!
I’d buy it. Especially if the driver was trapped inside, trying to unlock good car with an iPad. With growing panic, he starts smashing the window with the iPad. #
Then you end up where you end up, predestined to find John Calvin
“Do a nose grind next!”
Why did this sur sur sur surprise anyone alone these days?
Yep
You DID NOT SEE ANYTHING. SHUT YOUR MOUTH AND WALK AWAY
Reindeer mount included
Moon gates
Fuck yeah
He looks cool as fuck. I’d totally want to be his friend. Have a beer with him, listen to him talk about how his shift manager is a cunt that needs to be taught a lesson in life.
Cat tax: Of course Mona. Always Mona.
item.dc:creator: grapekoolaid

item.title: Merry Christmas with a few memes

item.title: Happy xmas from Glasgow, Scotland
item.description: Just a 49 year and 364 day old that took more joy in getting a Ken oodie than reasonably expected. I hope your day was full of joy and if it wasn't, tomorrow's not far round the corner. EDIT: For those asking, the hoodie is from Primark in the UK. It's kinda hard to get hold of, but persevere! And thanks for the small boardgame library compliments!

item.description: Hope everyone’s having a good whatever they celebrate! It was so warm in Florida today we had to turn the AC on >.< #christmas_selfie #christmas #selfie_day
item.dc:creator: thatgirlpiper

item.title: Bottom shelf meme dump. I know you crave memes.
item.description:
So, I tried to take a selfie with Deaf Cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) but it was more like:
Anyway...here's your meme dump.
@@HileyNoteson Merryooooooooooooo Christmas.
This is a 100% a true story that did 100% happen to me.
Yup. This is my actual kid. He's going places.
FF89DC
You can catch me live on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka streaming with my favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community server.
Join for the games! We've been playing Pay Day 3, GTA V, Jackbox, Among Us, 7 Days to Die, Sea of Thieves, Barotrauma, Ultimate Chicken Horse...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tex channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
So, Merry bottom shelf Christmas from me and Taxi Bear.
Taxi Bear tax. BONUS CHRISTMAS DUMP! https://imgur.com/gallery/qbB4ecj
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: If you need a break from too many selfies, here you go, some dump
item.dc:creator: procrastinatorman

item.title: Selfie game: Find the real me.
item.description:
Am I one of these dashing gentlemen?
How about one of these unlikely companions?
Speaking of companions...
If this is me, then I am a gift (my brother said so).
Not me. RIP Ron. Thanks for always reminding us destinations don't matter, "how you get there is the worthier part."
If you think this is me I think you have part of your brain missing.
If you're still wondering which it was, the username should help. Merry Christmas! Keep flying!
item.dc:creator: BrownestofCoats

item.dc:creator: WaifuLaifuCosplay

item.title: Unattractive Male Christmas Selfie
item.description: I apologize but all these selfies people are posting are attractive. We needed some unattractive to balance the scales a bit. I mean, have you seen these selfies? Women, attractive. Men, attractive. Trans, attractive. Non-Binary, attractive. Straight, attractive. LGBTQ+, attractive. Dogs, attractive. Cats, attractive. Chest cut open in the middle of surgery, attractive. Upside down, attractive. You: always attractive. Front Page Edit: hug someone that you find beautiful, however you may find them beautiful.
item.dc:creator: Uprightcerebralyacht

item.title: Merry Christmas I guess
item.description: I'm sad, depressed, lonely, and nothing is helping. Oh well. Merry Christmas and enjoy your day.

item.title: Merry Christmas yall!
item.description: Every year I watch the Christmas selfies come and go. This was the first year I felt confident in myself enough to join in! So merry Christmas yall! Edit or something: yall are all so sweet! I know its all upvotes no questions asked, but thank you all for being wholesome strangers. <3
